summary: Plan only. Recommended live canonical replacement for closed #63516: #69147 from the provided open-candidate set. Verified live pages show a distinct startup/init subfamily on 2026.3.24-2026.4.2 with empty Channels tables, no `[telegram]` startup logs, LaunchAgent/restart failures, and a linked PR #60700 on #60646, so bulk duplicate closure across the whole cluster would be unsafe. ([github.com](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/59833))

actions.reason: Best live canonical candidate for the runtime long-poll stall family; keep it open and route only clearly matching runtime-stall reports here.

Title points to a polling/init failure near the startup family; do not fold into the runtime-stall canonical without a full live re-fetch.
